block.greatech.lv_steam_engine_hatch.too: Consumes GTCEu steam to drive an adjacent steel shaft at a fixed speed.
block.greatech.mv_steam_engine_hatch.too: Consumes GTCEu steam to drive an adjacent steel shaft at a fixed speed.
block.greatech.hv_steam_engine_hatch.too: Consumes GTCEu steam to drive an adjacent steel shaft at a fixed speed.
greatech.configuration.title: Greatech Configs
greatech.configuration.fluidBridgeMaxEuP: Fluid Bridge Max EU Per Tick
greatech.configuration.fluidBridgeMaxPre: Fluid Bridge Max Pressure EU Per Tick
greatech.configuration.steamEngineHatchS: Steam Engine Hatch Steam Per Tick
greatech.configuration.createBeltConnect: Create Belt Connector Break Stress Limit
greatech.configuration.converterCapacity: Internal EU buffer sizes ordered as [LV, MV, HV].
greatech.configuration.converterMaxOutpu: Maximum EU generated each tick ordered as [LV, MV, HV].
greatech.configuration.converterOutputVo: GTCEu output voltage ordered as [LV, MV, HV].
greatech.configuration.converterOutputAm: Maximum packets per tick ordered as [LV, MV, HV]. Voltage x amperage limits export throughput.
greatech.configuration.converterEfficien: EU generated per 1 RPM of Create rotation ordered as [LV, MV, HV].
greatech.configuration.converterStressIm: Stress impact added to the Create kinetic network ordered as [LV, MV, HV].
greatech.configuration.converterMinimumS: Minimum absolute RPM required before the machine starts generating EU.
greatech.configuration.fluidBridgeTankCa: Internal fluid tank capacities in mB ordered as [LV, MV, HV].
greatech.configuration.fluidBridgeEnergy: Internal EU buffer sizes ordered as [LV, MV, HV].
greatech.configuration.fluidBridgeTransf: Maximum fluid moved each tick in mB/t ordered as [LV, MV, HV].
greatech.configuration.fluidBridgeEnergy: EU consumed per 1000 mB moved ordered as [LV, MV, HV].
greatech.configuration.fluidBridgeMaxEuP: Maximum EU consumed per tick ordered as [LV, MV, HV].
greatech.configuration.fluidBridgeInputV: Maximum accepted GTCEu input voltage ordered as [LV, MV, HV].
greatech.configuration.fluidBridgeInputA: Maximum accepted GTCEu input amperage ordered as [LV, MV, HV].
greatech.configuration.fluidBridgeMaxPre: Maximum Create fluid pressure each electric fluid bridge tier can apply.
greatech.configuration.fluidBridgeEuPerP: EU/t consumed for each point of applied Create fluid pressure.
greatech.configuration.fluidBridgeMaxPre: Maximum EU/t each electric fluid bridge tier may spend on Create fluid pressure.
greatech.configuration.steamEngineHatchR: Generated shaft RPM ordered as [LV, MV, HV]. Defaults keep all three tiers at 16 RPM.
greatech.configuration.steamEngineHatchS: Generated Create stress capacity ordered as [LV, MV, HV]. Defaults are [16, 64, 256].
Steam consumed each tick in mB/t ordered as [LV, MV, HV]. Defaults are [40, 60, 80].
greatech.configuration.createBeltConnect: Network stress above this value can break a Create belt connection in Greatech-monitored kinetic networks.
message.greatech.su_energy_converter.sta: Speed: %s rpm | Stored: %s EU | Generated: %s EU/t
message.greatech.electric_fluid_bridge.s: Stored: %s EU | Fluid: %s mB | Moved: %s mB/t | Used: %s EU/t
